## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo fmt --all -- --check` passes
- [ ] `cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings` passes
- [ ] `cargo test --workspace` passes (or excluded crates documented)
- [ ] No `TODO`, `FIXME`, `HACK`, or `XXX` comments introduced
- [ ] No `.unwrap()` in runtime paths (tests are fine)
- [ ] New functionality has test coverage
- [ ] Documentation updated if public APIs changed
- [ ] No secrets, private keys, or internal references in the diff

## Testing

Describe how you tested the changes. Include relevant commands.
